decision: Brand: Shopify of the Agent Economy
reason: Founder confirmed. Positions us as platform for ALL businesses (33M US SMBs), not just tech companies with APIs.

decision: 6-step agent journey replaces 9-dimension display as primary UI
reason: CEO test: anyone understands FIND/UNDERSTAND/SIGN UP/CONNECT/USE/PAY. Maps dimensions to business value.

decision: Scoring v4: auth-protected APIs get credit (401+JSON=87% of 200)
reason: Stripe scored 40 Bronze despite best API in world. Auth endpoints PROVE a good API exists.
alternatives: Require API keys for deep scan

decision: Vertical templates as free offer for business acquisition
reason: 33M SMBs need agent presence but cant build APIs. Free template → hosted MCP → per-call revenue.
No comprehensive agent readiness declaration file exists. Combines business info + capabilities + fulfillment + trust in one file.

decision: Gateway as the moat: one API, every service
reason: MCP tools + wallet billing + credential vault + fulfillment routing = defensible network effect.

decision: Fulfillment routing bridges agent calls to real businesses
reason: Agent calls MCP tool → we route to business via API/webhook/email/lead capture. Solves the 'last mile' problem.

decision: Scoring recalibrated from v1 to v4 over multiple iterations
reason: JarvisSDK (internal) outranked Stripe. Credibility-killing. Iterated: auth-aware, maturity signals, vertical weights.
alternatives: Separate scoring for tech vs non-tech
